transcript: That's well struck, oh what a hit that is, Korea Republic with one of the goals of the tournament out of nothing, Son has tried everything all through this steaming evening in Rostov-on-Don and finally his labours are rewarded. A magnificent hit. Some people were beginning to make their way out of the stadium to start the party here for Mexico. All a little bit too soon. That is a beautiful, unsavable strike. And if ever a player earned a goal like that, it's him.
